Package neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.pipeline

Class NorsokP002LineSizingValidator.LineSizingResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.pipeline.NorsokP002LineSizingValidator.LineSizingResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
NorsokP002LineSizingValidator
public static class NorsokP002LineSizingValidator.LineSizingResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result from validating one line against NORSOK P-002 screening limits.

  • Constructor Details

    • LineSizingResult

      public LineSizingResult(NorsokP002LineSizingValidator.ServiceType serviceType, double velocityMPerS, double lowerVelocityLimitMPerS, double upperVelocityLimitMPerS, double pressureGradientPaPerM, double pressureGradientLimitPaPerM, double densityKgPerM3, double erosionalVelocityMPerS, double allowedErosionalVelocityMPerS, boolean velocityAboveMinimum, boolean velocityBelowMaximum, boolean pressureGradientOk, boolean erosionalVelocityOk)
      Creates a line-sizing result.
      Parameters:
      serviceType - detected service type
      velocityMPerS - velocity in m/s
      lowerVelocityLimitMPerS - lower velocity limit in m/s
      upperVelocityLimitMPerS - upper velocity limit in m/s
      pressureGradientPaPerM - pressure gradient in Pa/m
      pressureGradientLimitPaPerM - pressure gradient limit in Pa/m
      densityKgPerM3 - mixture density in kg/m3
      erosionalVelocityMPerS - erosional velocity in m/s
      allowedErosionalVelocityMPerS - allowed erosional velocity in m/s
      velocityAboveMinimum - true when velocity is above the minimum limit
      velocityBelowMaximum - true when velocity is below the maximum limit
      pressureGradientOk - true when pressure gradient is acceptable
      erosionalVelocityOk - true when erosional velocity limit is acceptable

  • Method Details

    • getServiceType

      public NorsokP002LineSizingValidator.ServiceType getServiceType()
      Gets detected service type.
      Returns:
      detected service type

    • getVelocityMPerS

      public double getVelocityMPerS()
      Gets representative velocity.
      Returns:
      velocity in m/s

    • getPressureGradientPaPerM

      public double getPressureGradientPaPerM()
      Gets pressure gradient.
      Returns:
      pressure gradient in Pa/m

    • getAllowedErosionalVelocityMPerS

      public double getAllowedErosionalVelocityMPerS()
      Gets allowed erosional velocity.
      Returns:
      allowed erosional velocity in m/s

    • isAcceptable

      public boolean isAcceptable()
      Checks whether all configured limits are met.
      Returns:
      true if the line passes the screening checks

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Converts the result to an ordered map.
      Returns:
      ordered map for reports and JSON serialization

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Converts the result to pretty-printed JSON.
      Returns:
      JSON representation of the result
